questions.text: How much can you talk without pain, fatigue or discomfort?

choices.A: I can talk as much as I want without pain, fatigue or discomfort
choices.B: I can talk as much as I want, but it causes some pain, fatigue and/or discomfort
choices.C: Pain prevents me from talking as often as I would like
choices.D: Pain prevents me from talking at all

questions.text: How well can you care for your teeth and gums?

choices.A: I can care for my teeth and gums without limitation without fatigue and/or discomfort
choices.B: I can care for my teeth and gums as thoroughly as I wish, but it causes some pain, fatigue and/or discomfort
choices.C: Pain, fatigue and/or discomfort prevent me from brushing my teeth and gums as thoroughly and/or as often as I would like
choices.D: Pain, fatigue and/or discomfort prevent me from brushing my teeth and gums at all

questions.text: How well can you eat and chew?

choices.A: I can eat and chew without limitation, pain, fatigue and/or discomfort
choices.B: I can eat and chew foods that I desire, but it causes pain, fatigue and/or discomfort
choices.C: Pain, fatigue and/or discomfort prevent me from eating and chewing foods that I would like
choices.D: Pain, fatigue and/or discomfort prevent me from eating and chewing at all

questions.text: How well can you participate in normal social life and/or recreational activities?

choices.A: I do not experience fatigue or pain in my temples
choices.B: I experience fatigue or pain in my temples, but it does not interfere with my social and/or recreational activities
choices.C: Fatigue and/or pain in my temples interferes with my social and/or activities, but I can accomplish any task and I still get some enjoyment out of life
choices.D: Fatigue and/or pain in my temples significantly reduces my social and/or recreational activities
choices.E: Fatigue and/or pain in my temples prevents me from participating in any social and/or recreational activities

questions.section: SECTION 5 - Non-specialized jaw activities (yawning, mouth opening)
questions.text: How well can you yawn or open your mouth fully wide open?

choices.A: I have no limitation opening, so I can yawn, sing, shout, play musical instruments and chew with ease
choices.B: I have some limitation opening, but I can yawn, sing, shout, play musical instruments and chew with some difficulty
choices.C: I have moderate limitation opening my mouth
choices.D: I have severe limitation opening my mouth

questions.text: How well can you engage in customary sexual activities?

choices.A: I can engage in all customary sexual activities without limitation, fatigue, pain and/or discomfort
choices.B: I can engage in all customary sexual activities, but it causes fatigue, pain and/or discomfort
choices.C: Fatigue, pain and/or discomfort limit my customary sexual activities
choices.D: Fatigue, pain and/or discomfort prevent me from engaging in any sexual activities

choices.A: I have no difficulty sleeping because of pain in my jaw and face
choices.B: I sometimes have difficulty sleeping because of pain in my jaw and face
choices.C: I often have difficulty sleeping because of pain in my jaw and face
choices.D: I always have difficulty sleeping because of pain in my jaw and face
choices.E: Pain in my jaw and/or face prevents me from sleeping at all

questions.text: How effective is treatment in controlling or relieving your pain and discomfort?

choices.A: Treatment completely relieves my pain and discomfort
choices.B: Treatment substantially relieves my pain and discomfort
choices.C: Treatment moderately relieves my pain and discomfort
choices.D: Treatment minimally relieves my pain and discomfort
choices.E: Treatment does not relieve my pain and discomfort at all

questions.text: Do you experience ringing in your ear(s)?

choices.A: I do not experience ringing in my ear(s)
choices.B: I experience ringing in my ear(s), but it does not interfere with my daily activities or sleep
choices.C: I experience ringing in my ear(s) that moderately interferes with my daily activities and/or sleep
choices.D: I experience ringing in my ear(s) that substantially interferes with my daily activities and/or sleep
choices.E: I experience ringing in my ear(s) that completely interferes with my daily activities and/or sleep

choices.B: I experience dizziness, but it does not interfere with my daily activities
choices.C: I experience dizziness that moderately interferes with my daily activities
choices.D: I experience dizziness that substantially interferes with my daily activities
choices.E: I experience dizziness that completely interferes with my daily activities
